title: SELECT, Projection, Expressions, Types, and Result Contracts · Data-System Transfer
summary: An operations analyst needs a readable, reproducible ticket extract whose columns carry explicit meaning. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a typed ticket projection query pack with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compose SELECT and FROM clauses that project only required columns from a named relation.
Use relation and column aliases to make provenance and output contracts unambiguous.
Build arithmetic, text, date, and CASE expressions while tracing input and output meaning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab Select From
steps.instruction:
lab case — Return unresolved high-or-critical tickets plus unowned work from the seeded database. Expose ticket_id, a readable owner label, age bucket 4, and deterministic severity/opened ordering; then test a NULL owner and tied timestamp.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Distinct Duplicates
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable SQLite increment headed "-- Evidence: sql-distinct-duplicates-h9s5v6" with a concrete grain, hypothesis, or prediction; projection, expression, type, alias, or duplicate evidence; and an observation, reconciliation, or verification tied to returned rows, changed rows, an error, or a plan.

Evidence target: Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Distinct Duplicates.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Distinct Duplicates into observable performance evidence. For Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Distinct Duplicates, keep Distinct Duplicates connected to executable relational evidence.

content.code:
-- Evidence: sql-distinct-duplicates-h9s5v6
-- grain: declare the exact row or mutation grain before running
SELECT ticket_id,
       CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END AS urgency
FROM tickets
ORDER BY urgency, ticket_id;
-- observation: reconcile the returned rows, changed count, error, or plan with the prediction
